steps: 1. Total students = 120. Total degrees in pie chart = 360°. 2. Football = 150°, swimming = 90°, tennis = 60°. Sum of these = 150+90+60 = 300°. 3. Athletics degrees = 360° - 300° = 60°. 4. Fraction of students choosing athletics = 60/360 = 1/6. 5. Number of athletics students = 120 × (1/6) = 20. 6. Ratio boys:girls in athletics = 3:1. Total parts = 3+1 = 4. 7. Girls' share = 1/4 of athletics students = 20 × (1/4) = 5. 8. So number of girls choosing athletics = 5.
